parts.prompt:
Identify one factor that contributed to the outbreak of revolutions in the period circa 1750 to
1900.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: The spread of Enlightenment ideas contributed to revolutions across the Atlantic region during the period 1750 to 1900.
1 pt: The success of the American and French Revolutions contributed to the outbreak of further revolutions in Latin America and Haiti during the period 1750 to 1900.
1 pt: The weakening of the Spanish overseas empire contributed to the outbreak of revolutions across Latin America.

parts.prompt:
Explain one way that revolutionary movements used ideologies in their attempts to change
societies during the period circa 1750 to 1900.
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Revolutionary movements applied Enlightenment ideas like natural rights to establish new laws or constitutions that protected the rights of their citizens.
1 pt: Revolutionary movements like the French Revolution used nationalism to fight in numerous conflicts across Europe and expand the Napoleonic Empire.
1 pt: The Haitian Revolution used anti-colonial nationalism to reject French rule and seek self-determination and establish an independent sovereign state.

parts.prompt:
Explain one way in which revolutionary movements were challenged as they attempted to
change societies during the period circa 1750 to 1900.
AP WORLD HISTORY: MODERN 2025 n FREE-RESPONSE QUESTIONS
WORLD HISTORY: MODERN
rubric_criteria: 1 pt: Revolutionaries faced opposition from powerful states and empires who mobilized their armies and economic resources to suppress opposition.
1 pt: Revolutionary movements experienced resistance from established elites, for example opposition by plantation owners against the enslaved persons’ rebellion in the Haitian revolution.

1 pt: Nationalist revolutionary movements faced opposition from established states and empires in their attempts to liberate or unify nation-states, as seen, for example, in the Ottoman suppression of nationalist revolts in the Balkans.
